title: Foo Bar ClickHouse Live Schema Migration
description: Add a new column to a live ClickHouse table with existing data. The migration must not block reads/writes and must backfill the new column for existing rows.

tasks.description: Add region column to analytics.events, backfill existing rows, and ensure queries work with the new schema.

infrastructure.description: ClickHouse with analytics.events (event_id, event_ts, event_type, user_id). Add region column without downtime.
